problem id: 54d2b3b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(1)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01101011 -> 00010100
  11001010 -> 00000101
  11100001 -> 01000001
  01000000 -> 00000000
  11110011 -> 01100001
  00000101 -> 00000010
  00111010 -> 00010100
  11111011 -> 01110101
  11100010 -> 01000001

query: 00000110
predicted answer: 00000000
